Subject: Confirmation of Email for QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office  

Dear [Recipient],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by the BGC and AEB consultants on 31 October 2022, as per the provided mail and Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for us to commence the work for this project.  

Please confirm your availability to receive the necessary email communication related to this audit.  

We kindly request your assistance in arranging and confirming the email address for this purpose.  

Thank you for your cooperation.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]
